final_prompt.prompt:
Create a screenshot of a Douyin livestream featuring a female host.

Style/medium: needs a livestream interface aesthetic — exact UI styling is yours
Composition: must be 9:16 vertical format for mobile livestream, host centered in frame
Subject: must include a female host (the "神仙姐姐" character) holding a sign
Scene/backdrop: needs a livestream room setting — exact background decor is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a flattering livestream lighting setup — exact light source placement is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign the host is holding
Constraints: must preserve 9:16 aspect ratio, must appear as an authentic livestream screenshot interface
Avoid:
